info.title: PurviewDataAccess
info.description: Creates a data plane client for Purview Data Access.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: The endpoint of the Purview Data Access service. Example: https://api.purview-service.microsoft.com/

Action.description: Base type for a step in a workflow's action DAG. The concrete shape is selected by the `actionType` discriminator.

actionType.description: The type of action, used as the polymorphic discriminator.

actionName.description: The unique name of the action within the workflow. Names must be unique across the entire DAG.

ActionType.description: The set of supported workflow action kinds.

values.name: StartAndWaitForApproval
values.description: Starts an approval and waits for the response.

values.name: Condition
values.description: Branches execution based on a boolean expression.

values.name: CompleteDataSubscription
values.description: Completes the parent data subscription after access has been granted.

values.name: GrantAccessToAssets
values.description: Grants access to data assets for self-service scenarios.

ApprovalAction.description: Starts an approval and waits for the response.

inputs.description: Inputs that configure the approval request.

title.description: The title displayed on the approval request.

assignedTo.description: The list of identities (object IDs) assigned to approve the request.

ApprovalWorkflow.description: Represents a workflow approval request that links a workflow run to its approvers.

approvalRequestId.description: The unique identifier of the approval request.

workflowRunId.description: The identifier of the workflow run this approval is associated with.

workflowId.description: The identifier of the workflow definition this approval is associated with.

callbackUrl.description: The callback URL the workflow uses to report the approval outcome.

isPendingOnAll.description: Indicates whether the approval requires action from every approver in the list.

approvers.description: The list of approver object identifiers.

title.description: The title of the approval request.

status.description: The current status of the approval (e.g., 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'Rejected').

requestorIdentity.description: The requestor identity - the person requesting data access.

subscriberIdentity.description: The subscriber identity - the person who will receive data access.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Azure REST API guidelines - https://aka.ms/AzureRestApiGuidelines#handling-errors.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

CompleteDataSubscriptionAction.description: Completes the parent data subscription after access has been granted.

ConditionAction.description: Branches workflow execution based on a boolean expression.

inputs.description: Inputs that configure the branching condition and its branches.

expressions.description: The expressions evaluated to determine which branch to execute.

actions.description: The actions to execute when the condition evaluates to true.

elseActions.description: The actions to execute when the condition evaluates to false.

attestations.description: Attestations that policy approvers must acknowledge.

managerApprovalRequired.description: Whether manager approval is required for access requests.

dataCopyPermitted.description: Whether data may be copied by subscribers after access is granted.

CriticalDataElementPolicySet.description: Policy set applied to a critical data element.

CriticalDataElementPolicySetListResponse.description: List of critical data element policy sets.

value.description: The list of critical data element policy sets.

DataAssetValues.description: Data asset values included in a subscription.

attestations.description: Attestations that policy approvers must acknowledge.

managerApprovalRequired.description: Whether manager approval is required for access requests.

dataCopyPermitted.description: Whether data may be copied by subscribers after access is granted.

permittedUseCases.description: Permitted use cases for the data product.

dataAccessGrantors.description: The list of data access grantors.

sensitiveMarkers.description: Sensitive markers applied to the data product.

termsOfUseRequired.description: Whether terms of use acceptance is required.

partnerSharingPermitted.description: Whether sharing with partners is permitted.

customerSharingPermitted.description: Whether sharing with customers is permitted.

privacyComplianceApprovalRequired.description: Whether privacy compliance approval is required.

skipWorkflow.description: Whether the workflow can be skipped.

DataProductPolicySet.description: Policy set applied to a data product.

DataProductWorkflowSettingsResponse.description: Response with workflow settings for a data product.

skipWorkflowEnabled.description: Whether the skip workflow option is enabled.

DataSubscription.description: Represents a data access subscription request.

dataSubscriptionId.description: The unique identifier of the data subscription.

useWorkflow.description: Whether this subscription uses a workflow. Derived from the data product's workflow settings; read-only on the wire.

workflowId.description: The workflow identifier associated with this subscription. Resolved server-side from the data product's workflow settings; read-only on the wire.

workflowType.description: The type of workflow. Resolved server-side from the data product's workflow settings; read-only on the wire.

workflowName.description: The name of the workflow. Resolved server-side from the data product's workflow settings; read-only on the wire.

governanceDomain.description: The governance domain path. Enriched server-side from the data product; read-only on the wire.

writeAccess.description: Whether write access is requested. Resolved server-side from the request context; read-only on the wire.

subscriptionStatus.description: The status of the subscription. Transitioned by the approve/reject/complete endpoints; read-only on the wire.

dataProductName.description: The name of the data product. Enriched server-side from the referenced data product; read-only on the wire.

businessDomainName.description: The name of the business domain. Enriched server-side from the referenced data product; read-only on the wire.

globalComment.description: A general comment for the subscription.

policySetValues.description: Policy set values for the subscription.

createdBy.description: The user who created the subscription.

accessExpirationDate.description: The access expiration date. Computed server-side from the policy duration at approval time; read-only on the wire.

accessDecisionDate.description: The date when the access decision was made.

dataAssets.description: The data assets included in the subscription.

accessProviders.description: The list of access provider identifiers. Derived server-side from the workflow approvers; read-only on the wire.

usePowerAutomate.description: Whether Power Automate is used. Resolved server-side from the data product's workflow settings; read-only on the wire.

DataSubscriptionPolicySetValues.description: Policy set values associated with a data subscription.

useCases.description: The use cases for the subscription.

DataSubscriptionStatus.description: The status of a data subscription.

attestations.description: Attestations that policy approvers must acknowledge.

managerApprovalRequired.description: Whether manager approval is required for access requests.

dataCopyPermitted.description: Whether data may be copied by subscribers after access is granted.

DomainPolicySet.description: Policy set applied to a business domain.

Expression.description: A boolean expression evaluated by a ConditionAction.

type.description: The logical operator combining the operands (e.g., 'and', 'or').

equality.description: The equality comparison applied between the operands (e.g., 'IsEqualTo').

GrantAccessToAssetsAction.description: Grants access to data assets for self-service scenarios.

Identity.description: Identity information for a user or group.

objectId.description: The object ID of the identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the identity.

displayName.description: The display name of the identity.

email.description: The email address of the identity.

value.description: The DataSubscription items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

value.description: The Workflow items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PolicyAttestation.description: An attestation that a policy approver must acknowledge.

displayName.description: The display name of the attestation.

documentReference.description: A reference to the supporting document.

PolicySet.description: Represents an access policy set applied to a resource.

policySetId.description: The unique identifier of the policy set.

targetResource.description: The target resource for the policy set.

PolicySetKind.description: The kind of policy set, identifying the governance entity it applies to.

values.name: Domain
values.description: Policy set for a business domain.

values.name: DataProduct
values.description: Policy set for a data product.

values.name: CriticalDataElement
values.description: Policy set for a critical data element.

inputs.description: Inputs that configure the email notification.

item.description: The item the notification refers to.

additionalBody.description: Additional body text appended to the notification.

additionalSubject.description: Additional subject text appended to the notification.

assignedTo.description: The list of identities (object IDs) that should receive the notification.

SensitiveMarker.description: A sensitive marker that restricts which subscribers may access a data product.

securityGroup.description: The security group that the marker applies to.

tags.description: The classification tags carried by the marker.

TagType.description: The classification of a sensitive marker tag value.

TargetResource.description: The target resource for a policy set.

TargetType.description: The type of governance entity that a policy set targets.

attestations.description: Attestations that policy approvers must acknowledge.

managerApprovalRequired.description: Whether manager approval is required for access requests.

dataCopyPermitted.description: Whether data may be copied by subscribers after access is granted.

TermPolicySet.description: Policy set applied to a term.

value.description: The list of term policy sets.

Trigger.description: A trigger that activates a workflow.

TriggerType.description: The type of trigger that activates a workflow.

values.name: DataAccessRequestSubmitted
values.description: Triggered when a data access request is submitted.

values.name: DataProductPublish
values.description: Triggered when a data product is published.

values.name: TermPublish
values.description: Triggered when a term is published.

UseCase.description: A use case describing how a data product may be used.

title.description: The title of the use case.

description.description: The description of the use case.

Workflow.description: Represents a data access workflow definition.

workflowId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow.

triggers.description: The triggers that activate this workflow.

actionDag.description: The action DAG (directed acyclic graph) defining the workflow steps.

createdBy.description: The user who created the workflow.

lastModifiedBy.description: The user who last modified the workflow.

accessProviders.description: The list of access provider identifiers.

WorkflowActionRequest.description: Request body for a workflow approve or reject action.

comment.description: Optional comment from the approver explaining the decision.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run record.

workflowRunId.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run.

status.description: The status of the workflow run.

workflowRunName.description: The name of the workflow run.

actionDag.description: The action DAG for this run.

WorkflowRunApproval.description: Represents an approval action within a workflow run, including the status of each approver.

title.description: The title of the approval action.

approvalStatuses.description: The list of approval statuses for this approval action.

value.description: The list of workflow run approvals.

WorkflowRunApprovalStatus.description: Represents the status of an individual approver within an approval action.

comment.description: The comment provided by the approver.

Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.name: api-version
Azure.Core.Foundations.ApiVersionParamet.description: The API version to use for this operation.
